title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan founded Corgi by questioning legacy insurance industry defaults rather than modernizing existing carriers. Operating as outsiders to the sector, they rebuilt insurance from the ground up over two years of regulatory challenges and multiple near-failures, securing a $108M Series A and achieving several hundred million ARR.
